message:
feat(python): numpy.ma.mask_or wrapper parity (franken_numpy-s7op)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.ma.mask_or(m1, m2, copy, shrink)
that combines two masks via logical-or. Test covers pairwise bool
masks, nomask | mask and mask | nomask view semantics, both-nomask
identity, shrink=True collapsing all-False to nomask, shrink=False
retaining the explicit False array, copy=True producing fresh
storage, and 2-D mask combination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
